Nil Rosenquest, Esq. of ROSENQUEST & ASSOCIATES 292-0980, for defendant Shalia De Savigne, moving for relief from entry of default and default judgment
No appearance by plaintiff. Tentative ruling adopted -- DEFENDANT SHALIA DE SAVIGNE'S MOTION For Relief From Entry Of Default And Default Judgment -- Motion is GRANTED. Plaintiff is awarded costs of $879.50. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (JJM/301/CL) Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR #7855
